title: Quantum Advantage in Finance
description: Explore where and how quantum computing can provide advantages for financial applications. Understand quantum algorithms, their potential speedups, and current limitations.
learningObjectives: Identify financial problems suitable for quantum computing
Understand quantum speedups for optimization and simulation
Compare QAOA, VQE, and quantum amplitude estimation approaches
Recognize current limitations and timeline for quantum advantage
Evaluate the quantum finance landscape and key players
